name: Core Forests
subtitle: A low-risk entry point into professionally designed forestry investments
description: Conventional, professionally structured forestry investments with proven species, clear rotation planning, and conservative underwriting for first-time investors.

variants.label: 1-10 ha
variants.description: Base pricing for early-stage or pilot forestry allocations.

variants.label: 10-50 ha
variants.description: Includes a 5% reduction on establishment and annual maintenance.

variants.label: 50-100 ha
variants.description: Portfolio build tier for institutional and family-office planting.

variants.label: 100-500 ha
variants.description: Scaled operating tier with larger procurement and management efficiencies.

variants.label: 500+ ha
variants.description: Largest acreage pricing with cumulative stage-based discounting applied.

highlights: Conventional, proven species and silviculture
Conservative yield and return assumptions
Standard genetics widely adopted in the region
Clear rotation timelines, performance variance and cashflow expectations
Ideal for first-time forestry investors

detailSections.title: Investment fit
items: Designed for investors prioritising execution reliability over frontier upside.
Clear establishment and maintenance cost structure for simple underwriting.
Suitable for phased expansion once the first planted hectares are performing.

name: High-Performance Forests
subtitle: World-class genetics and optimized systems targeting superior returns
description: Advanced forest investment structures built around elite genetics, active monitoring, and technical silviculture for return-focused capital.

variants.label: 1-10 ha
variants.description: Base pricing for intensive, high-performance forestry deployment.

variants.label: 10-50 ha
variants.description: Reduced pricing on both establishment and annual maintenance.

variants.label: 50-100 ha
variants.description: For multi-block allocations with enhanced monitoring and reporting.

variants.label: 100-500 ha
variants.description: Scaled high-yield platform pricing for serious timber portfolios.

variants.label: 500+ ha
variants.description: Cumulative stage discount applied for the largest mandates.

highlights: Improved, hybrid and clonal genetics with superior growth traits
Higher yield and shorter rotation potential
Premium seedling quality optimised for survival
Technical silviculture matched to the genetics
Site-genotype matching using performance data
Advanced growth and yield forecasting
Active performance monitoring and adaptive management
Live data and insights into high-value markets
Designed for return-focused investors

detailSections.title: Execution model
items: Designed for investors who want better growth curves, tighter management, and richer data feedback loops.
Best fit where site conditions and capital pacing support premium genetics and technical field execution.

name: Dryland & Frontier Forests
subtitle: Cutting edge forestry systems engineered for dry and marginal environments
description: Featured frontier forestry systems for water-limited and marginal sites, combining resilient genetics, site analytics, and asymmetric upside.

variants.label: 1-10 ha
variants.description: Base pricing for frontier and dryland establishment.

variants.label: 10-50 ha
variants.description: Stage discount applied at this acreage band.

variants.label: 50-100 ha
variants.description: Designed for frontier programmes spanning multiple dryland blocks.

variants.label: 100-500 ha
variants.description: Scaled pricing for resilient forestry deployments across larger landscapes.

variants.label: 500+ ha
variants.description: Largest acreage tier with cumulative discounting.

highlights: Elite, stress-tolerant genetics and advanced clones/hybrids
Dryland and water-limited silvicultural systems
Higher biological and execution risk with asymmetric upside
Deep site analytics and climate-resilience modelling
Built for sophisticated, innovation driven capital

detailSections.title: Risk profile
items: Higher biological and execution risk than conventional forestry, with correspondingly higher upside when matched to the right sites.
Best suited to sophisticated capital comfortable with innovation, adaptive management, and climate analytics.

name: Uganda Concessions
subtitle: Government-linked concession opportunities with map-based site review
description: A featured map-driven page of concession opportunities where investors can explore available Uganda land offerings, compare site context, and open each concession for a focused diligence view.
highlights: Map-first review of available concession points
Rich marker popups with quick diligence context
Detailed site descriptions when a marker is selected
Built for investors comparing multiple concession pathways
mapDescription: Select a marker to turn the page into a focused description of that concession site.

mapPoints.name: West Nile Commercial Concession
mapPoints.label: Concession
mapPoints.summary: A large-format concession corridor with strong access potential and staged establishment sequencing.
details: Targeted for phased commercial planting with room for processing-linked expansion.
Road access and labour draw radius are attractive relative to comparable frontier blocks.
Best suited to investors wanting a flagship Uganda concession platform.

mapPoints.name: Bunyoro Mixed-Terrain Concession
mapPoints.label: Concession
mapPoints.summary: Mixed-terrain opportunity with corridor planting potential and strong optionality across conventional and high-performance programmes.
details: Well suited to a blended strategy that starts conventional and upgrades select blocks into higher-yield genetics.
Landscape diversity supports differentiated land-use planning and resilience modelling.

mapPoints.name: Busoga Growth Corridor Concession
mapPoints.label: Concession
mapPoints.summary: A more market-connected concession profile aimed at investors prioritising logistics and ramp speed.
details: Closer to consumption corridors and easier to stage around transport planning.
Useful for investors wanting faster diligence-to-deployment transitions.

detailSections.title: How to use this page
items: Start with the map to compare concession geography and site labels.
Click a marker or popup action to swap the right-hand panel into a full site description.
Use the metrics to shortlist the concessions that fit your mandate before moving into diligence.

name: Land Listings
subtitle: Current land offerings with map-linked site descriptions and minimum starting prices
description: Browse current land offerings on a live map, compare minimum starting prices, and click each site to turn the product page into a detailed land-offering description.
highlights: Shows minimum starting price before diligence
Marker selection updates the page into the chosen site description
Useful for investors comparing current entry points across several listings
mapDescription: Click any site marker to switch the page focus to that land offering.

mapPoints.name: Masindi Expansion Parcel
mapPoints.label: Land
mapPoints.summary: Entry parcel with strong expansion potential and straightforward initial site preparation.
details: Open terrain with room for phased block design and internal access planning.
Suited to core forestry or mixed-strategy establishment.

mapPoints.name: Mubende Ridge Site
mapPoints.label: Land
mapPoints.summary: A ridgeline site with good visibility, suitable for performance-oriented planting and disciplined water planning.
details: Requires tighter establishment sequencing but offers stronger positioning for premium forestry programmes.
Good candidate for high-performance forest structures.

mapPoints.name: Moroto Frontier Plot
mapPoints.label: Land
mapPoints.summary: A frontier dryland plot positioned for resilient forestry experiments and climate-focused investment theses.
details: Higher execution complexity with strong relevance for frontier and dryland systems.
Appeals to capital looking for innovation exposure rather than pure convention.

detailSections.title: Listing workflow
items: Use minimum starting price as the first screen, then click through each marker for site-specific detail.
The selected site panel is the main product description state for the active land offering.
